Partners

The partner ecosystem exists to strengthen the architecture

Rotata works with a small ecosystem because the system needs fit, reliability and clean integration more than endless tool choice.

Review the system See integrations
01

Contexto

Ecosystem overview

The ecosystem is selected to support the operating model. Tools are never framed as the product.

02

Ecosistema

Partner roles

Each partner platform reinforces a different layer inside the same system.

HubSpot

CRM architecture, workflow automation and revenue reporting

Ver encaje

ZoomInfo

Account data depth, enrichment and targeting intelligence

Ver encaje

Synapsale

Account engagement signals, timing and prioritization

Ver encaje
03

Modelo operativo

Tool breakdown

Each tool has a defined job inside the architecture.

01

HubSpot for CRM structure and reporting

02

ZoomInfo for data depth and account context

03

Synapsale for timing and signal activation

04

Nothing enters the stack without system fit

04

Contexto

Why these tools

Rotata chooses platforms for how well they support structure, traceability and commercial usability.

05

Proceso

System fit

A platform only stays in the stack when it behaves well inside the wider model.

01

Define the role

02

Map data and workflow touchpoints

03

Connect to CRM and reporting

04

Keep only if the system becomes more coherent

06

Prueba

Value to the client

The value is not access to software. It is a more coherent system.

01

Clearer platform choices

02

Less mismatch between tools and process

03

Better workflow continuity

04

Stronger visibility into where each platform adds value

Partner roles

HubSpot

CRM architecture, workflow automation and revenue reporting

ZoomInfo

Account data depth, enrichment and targeting intelligence

Ver encaje

Synapsale

Account engagement signals, timing and prioritization

Ver encaje

Review which partners actually fit the system

Consulta

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
